items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• Lesson 1
• I drink I eat
• You drink You eat
• I drink water I eat bread
• I drink juice I eat cheese

items.prompt: Eu bebo água Eu como pão
items.answer: I drink water I eat bread

items.prompt: Eu bebo suco Eu como queijo
items.answer: I drink juice I eat cheese

items.prompt: Você bebe café Você come peixe
items.answer: You drink coffee You eat Fish
